name: &RNew Market Square&n
description:
&n   You are in the &RNew Market Square&n. It's the main place of the Wardome City,
and every day lots of adventurers show up here. It's the best place you'll find
if you are looking for someone to trade, to group, or even to pkill...
&n   &CThe Center of the Temple Street&n is north of here, and &CThe Center of the
Second Street&n is to the south. The &cFirst Street&n goes on to east and west.
